name: Jorge Dalto
abstract: Jorge Dalto (July 8, 1948 – October 27, 1987) was a pop, jazz and Afro-Cuban music pianist from Argentina, and the former musical director and keyboardist (together with Ronnie Foster) for George Benson, contributing the acoustic piano intro and solo to Benson's 1976 Grammy-winning hit version of Leon Russell's "This Masquerade". He also…

concerts.label: Newport Jazz Festival: Jon Lucien, George Benson Quintet, and Milt Jackson
Kool Jazz Festival: Tropical Surge: The Afro-Brazilian Sensation

about_quotes.speaker: Mario Bauza
about_quotes.evidence: And there's another guy with (inaudible) Jorge Dalto, the Argentine Piano player with Benson (inaudible)?

about_quotes.speaker: Paquito D'Rivera
about_quotes.evidence: There is other people doing that like Jorge Dalto was doing that even before me, long time before me
